name: markdown
description: Safe Markdown rendering: marked + highlight.js with HTML sanitization. Ships a <Markdown/> component and a renderMarkdown() util under $lib/markdown, used by the content modules (content-collection, blog, faq) to render DB/user content without XSS.

inject.text:
### markdown
- Render Markdown with `import { Markdown } from "$lib/markdown"` → `<Markdown source={post.body} />`, or the `renderMarkdown(md)` util for HTML.
- **Always render DB/user Markdown through this** — it sanitizes the HTML (strips scripts/handlers), so `{@html}` is safe. Never `{@html}` raw Markdown output.
- Code blocks are highlighted with highlight.js (`hljs` classes); add a highlight.js theme CSS in your app if you want colors.

instructions: Render Markdown in a Svelte page:  import { Markdown } from "$lib/markdown";  then  <Markdown source={markdownString} />.
Or get sanitized HTML directly:  import { renderMarkdown } from "$lib/markdown";  const html = renderMarkdown(md).
For colored code blocks, add a highlight.js theme to your global CSS, e.g. import "highlight.js/styles/github-dark.css" in your root layout.
